cards.prompt: GetOrAdd(2, k=>100) затем GetOrAdd(2, k=>999) в один поток: v1, v2, factoryRuns?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Concurrent; var cd = new ConcurrentDictionary<int, int>(); int f = 0; int v1 = cd.GetOrAdd(2, k => { f++; return 100; }); int v2 = cd.GetOrAdd(2, k => { f++; return 999; }); System.Console.WriteLine($"{v1} {v2} factoryRuns={f}");

cards.prompt: ConcurrentQueue: GetEnumerator, потом Enqueue(4); snapshot-count vs live-count?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Concurrent; var q = new ConcurrentQueue<int>(); q.Enqueue(1); q.Enqueue(2); q.Enqueue(3); var e = q.GetEnumerator(); q.Enqueue(4); int c = 0; while (e.MoveNext()) c++; System.Console.WriteLine($"snapshot-count={c} live-count={q.Count}");

using System.Collections; using System.Collections.Concurrent; var cd = new ConcurrentDictionary<int, int>(); var q = new ConcurrentQueue<int>(); System.Console.WriteLine($"dict.IsSynchronized={((ICollection)cd).IsSynchronized} queue.IsSynchronized={((ICollection)q).IsSynchronized}");
